allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add multi-platform support and update documentation

- Added macOS build configuration to package.json (dmg, zip)
- Updated README.md with platform-specific download sections (Windows/Mac)
- Added developer contact information (Binary - randomwalk1225@gmail.com)
- Clarified build instructions for both Windows and macOS

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Optimize pen drawing performance with RAF throttling

Performance improvements:
- Added requestAnimationFrame pattern for drawing (like image dragging)
- Reduced rendering from 120+ fps to 60 fps max
- Optimized Perfect-freehand settings:
  * smoothing: 0.8 → 0.5 (better responsiveness)
  * streamline: 0.3 → 0.15 (reduced lag)
- Increased distance threshold: 0.01 → 0.05 (fewer points)
- Cancel RAF on mouse up to prevent orphaned frames

Expected results:
- Pen strokes now keep up with drawing speed
- More natural, responsive feel
- Reduced React re-renders by ~50%

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
